THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DAVIS, RONLENIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT JOHNSON, GERALDINE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2012 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-17-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT MADE AN AGREEMENT RE PAYMENTS. DEFENDANT WILL PAY PLAINTIFF $50 PER MONTH DIRECTLY BEGINNING ON AUGUST 3RD AND TO BE PAID ON OR BY THE 3RD EACH MONTH. CONTINUED 6 MONTHS FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF PAYMENTS ARE NOT MADE, PLAINTIFF SHALL NOTIFY THE COURT IN WRITING AND REQUEST A HEARING DATE EARLIER.
